name: ADAMAS TRUST, INC.
summary: Adamas Trust, Inc. (formerly New York Mortgage Trust, Inc.) is an internally-managed REIT focused on deploying capital across real estate and capital markets. It owns and manages a diversified portfolio of mortgage-related single-family and multi-family assets, Agency RMBS, non-Agency RMBS, residential loans, and business purpose loans. Through its wholly-owned subsidiary Constructive Loans, LLC, it originates business purpose loans for residential real estate investors, operating in 48 states.

products.name: Agency RMBS
products.description: Residential mortgage-backed securities guaranteed by GSEs such as Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, or Ginnie Mae.

products.name: Business Purpose Loans
products.description: Short-term and rental loans for residential real estate investors, originated through Constructive Loans, LLC.

products.name: Non-Agency RMBS
products.description: Residential mortgage-backed securities not guaranteed by any U.S. government agency or GSE.

products.name: Multi-family CMBS
products.description: Commercial mortgage-backed securities backed by commercial mortgage loans on multi-family properties.

products.name: Excess MSRs
products.description: Excess mortgage servicing spreads representing difference between contractual and base servicing fees.

products.name: Mezzanine Lending
products.description: Preferred equity and mezzanine loan investments in multi-family properties.

partnerships.description: GSE whose guaranteed RMBS are included in the Company's Agency investment portfolio.
GSE whose guaranteed RMBS and Consolidated SLST securitizations are part of the Company's portfolio.
U.S. government agency whose guaranteed RMBS are included in the Company's Agency investment portfolio.
